caption: A person's hands are seen interacting with a "Topps CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" sports card box. The box is black and white with blue accents, featuring a baseball player on the front. Across the frames, the person's left hand holds the side of the box while the right hand reaches toward the top. In the later frames, the right hand lifts the lid of the box, revealing the contents inside. A smaller video inset in the bottom right shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap, who appears to be reacting to the action. Large red and white text overlaying the bottom of the scene reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS". Other legible text on the packaging includes "2020", "ACETATE CARD", and "ONE ENCASED AUTO". The background is a plain, light-colored surface, and the scene remains consistent except for the movement of the hands opening the box.
